title: The Hidden Gem of Slovenia's Lakes

scenes.text: This fairytale lake features a tiny island with a church!
This is Lake Bled, located in the Julian Alps of Slovenia.
The island holds the Assumption of Mary Church, dating back to 994 AD.
You can ring the church bell for good luck!
scenes.label: RING FOR LUCK

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Lake Bled, Julian Alps - Slovenia. A picturesque lake home to a charming island with an ancient church. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
